# `license_entitlement` stanza

@include 'alerts/enterprise-only.mdx'

<Note title="Required when using an IBM PAO license">
  The `license_entitlement` stanza is required to start up a Vault Enterprise server with an IBM PAO license. If you are
  using a HashiCorp license, this stanza is not required and will have no effect if included in the configuration file.
</Note>

The `license_entitlement` stanza specifies various parameters for selecting the desired Vault Enterprise entitlement
from a configured IBM PAO license to use for the Vault server. If the parameters do not match any of the valid entitlements
in the IBM PAO license, the Vault server will not start up and the logs will contain an error indicating that no valid license was found.
If the parameters match multiple entitlements in the license, the Vault server will use the entitlement with the latest termination date.

```hcl
license_entitlement {
  edition = "premium"
  add_ons = "advanced-data-protection-key-management, advanced-data-protection"
}
```

## `license_entitlement` parameters

- `edition` `(string: <required>)` - The Vault Enterprise version to use for the Vault server. This should be set to the
edition specified in the IBM PAO license entitlement that you want to use for the Vault server. Valid values are `standard`, `plus`, and `premium`.
- `add_ons` `(string: <optional>)` - Add-ons are additional features or modules that can be purchased like Advanced Data Protection
or Key Management. If the entitlement includes any add-ons, this should be set to a comma-separated list of the add-ons specified in the IBM PAO license entitlement.
